{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Weeping Dragon swords
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Markuth]]'s [[Weeping Dragon swords]] can defend against his parasite-like weapon.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
